nasb.text: “For there is hope for a tree, When it is cut down, that it will sprout again, And its shoots will not fail.

esv.text: “For there is hope for a tree, if it be cut down, that it will sprout again, and that its shoots will not cease.

cnv.text: 樹木常有希望， 樹木若被砍下，也會再發芽， 嫩枝仍生長不息。

ccb.text: 树木若被砍下，还有希望， 它仍可重新萌芽， 嫩枝生长不息。
